commands: grep -E 'Bridge is ready|Listening to group|Linked WhatsApp|authenticated|Auth failure|Disconnected|Failed|Forwarding|Recorded|QR code|Another bridge' /home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out.log | tail -20 | tr -cd '\11\12\15\40-\176'

sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 jlist' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log('status='+p?.pm2_env?.status);console.log('restarts='+p?.pm2_env?.restart_time);console.log('uptime_sec='+Math.floor((Date.now()-p?.pm2_env?.pm_uptime)/1000));});"
